changes: fixes the repeated USER_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND error caused by Firebase transactions temporarily starting with null
reuses the server-verified financial profile instead of replacing it with a missing-account probe
adds an authoritative root fallback that searches by auth UID, financial UID, email, phone, and public user ID
keeps the wheel animation immediate and preserves idempotent debit and payout protection
keeps V218 draw scheduling, V219 speed improvements, and V220 exchange account linking unchanged
